nasb.text: Jesse took a donkey loaded with bread and a jug of wine and a young goat, and sent them to Saul by David his son.

esv.text: And Jesse took a donkey laden with bread and a skin of wine and a young goat and sent them by David his son to Saul.

cnv.text: 耶西就牽來一頭驢子，馱上餅、一皮袋酒和一隻山羊羔，交給他的兒子大衛送給掃羅。

ccb.text: 耶西就把一些饼、一皮袋酒和一只山羊羔驮在驴背上，让儿子大卫带去送给扫罗。
